title: Robust Crispy Greek King Prawns Skewers
description: A pungent and crispy Greek dish featuring raw king prawns, perfect for a date night, this recipe is low in sodium and served in a lacquerware bowl.
instructions: In a large lacquerware bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, thyme, paprika, and salt-free seasoning.
Add the raw king prawns to the marinade and toss to coat, covering the bowl with plastic wrap.
Refrigerate the prawns for 30 minutes to allow the flavors to penetrate.
In a small bowl, mix together cornstarch and water until smooth.
Remove the prawns from the marinade, allowing any excess to drip off.
Dip each prawn into the cornstarch mixture, coating lightly.
Thread the coated prawns onto skewers, leaving a small space between each prawn.
Heat about 1/2 inch of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat until it reaches 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Add the prawn skewers to the hot oil and fry for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Remove the skewers from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the crispy prawn skewers hot, garnished with lemon wedges and fresh parsley.
